channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Planned fuel duty rise to be scrapped, says Starmer as he defends changes to Russian oil sanctions – UK politics live
item.description: Planned fuel duty rise to be scrapped, says Starmer as he defends changes to Russian oil sanctions – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch brands watering down Russia oil sanctions ‘insane’
item.description: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch brands watering down Russia oil sanctions ‘insane’

item.title: FT UK Politics: Keir Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
item.description: Keir Starmer postpones fuel duty increase

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’
item.description: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil

item.title: Independent UK Politics: In The Room | Burnham or Brexit 2.0? Analysing the Labour leadership face-off
item.description: In The Room | Burnham or Brexit 2.0? Analysing the Labour leadership face-off

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Why I think Burnham will win in Makerfield.
item.description: Why I think Burnham will win in Makerfield.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: I worked for Andy Burnham – here’s why he would be a brilliant prime minister
